scenarios.title: proof_of_life 200 branch matches the real served login shell

gherkin.given: the disposable smackerel-test-e2e-ui stack in dev-token mode (AuthConfig.Enabled=false) and an unauthenticated Playwright navigation to /
gherkin.when: / is 303-redirected to /login?next=/ (spec 057 browser-login-redirect) and Playwright follows it
gherkin.then: the served 200 document is the login shell (internal/api/admin_ui_static/login.html) and proof_of_life asserts title 'Sign in — Smackerel' and h1 'Sign in' and passes GREEN

linkedTests.testId: proof of life: served / route renders against the test stack

scenarios.title: the corrected 200 branch is adversarial, not a silent-pass

gherkin.given: the corrected proof_of_life 200-branch with exact-match title/h1 assertions
gherkin.when: / serves anything other than the login shell (blank / error / PWA index / search page)
gherkin.then: the exact-match assertion FAILS (no bailout, no optional assertion, no URL-only fallback), as proven by the before-fix RED failing on the mismatched title 'Smackerel' vs 'Sign in — Smackerel'

linkedTests.testId: proof of life: served / route renders against the test stack (before-fix RED / after-fix GREEN)
